description: A small AI benchmark claim audit database: MLPerf Inference v5.1 result claims with source URLs, verbatim evidence spans, benchmark scope conditions, scenario labels, and distillation-gate promotion decisions.

source_papers.title: MLPerf Inference v5.1 result 5.1-0001: Llama2-70B Offline on 8x AMD Instinct MI300X
MLPerf Inference v5.1 result 5.1-0002: Llama2-70B Server on 8x AMD Instinct MI300X
MLPerf Inference v5.1 result 5.1-0003: Mixtral-8x7B Offline on 8x AMD Instinct MI300X
MLPerf Inference v5.1 result 5.1-0004: Mixtral-8x7B Server on 8x AMD Instinct MI300X
MLPerf Inference v5.1 result 5.1-0007: Llama2-70B Offline on 8x AMD Instinct MI325X
MLPerf Inference v5.1 result 5.1-0008: Llama2-70B Server on 8x AMD Instinct MI325X

demo_queries.query: What Llama2-70B throughput claims are supported, and under which MLPerf scenarios?
demo_queries.expected_behavior: Return separate Offline and Server claims with hardware, benchmark, scenario, and measured samples/s preserved.

demo_queries.query: Which promoted benchmark claims are scoped to MI300X vs MI325X hardware?
demo_queries.expected_behavior: Do not collapse MI300X and MI325X throughput claims into one generic result.

records.paper_title: MLPerf Inference v5.1 result 5.1-0001: Llama2-70B Offline on 8x AMD Instinct MI300X
records.text: AS-8125GS-TNMR2 with 8x AMD Instinct MI300X reported 27,803.9 samples/s on llama2-70b-99 in the Offline scenario.
records.evidence_span: MLPerf Inference v5.1 closed division result 5.1-0001 reports system_name AS-8125GS-TNMR2 with 8x AMD Instinct MI300X, benchmark llama2-70b-99, scenario Offline, performance_sample_count 24576, and Result Samples per second 27803.9.
